CustomField.description: Lookup the property associated with this Service File. Tip: Create a Property record first before looking it up here. Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
Lookup the property associated with this Service File.
Tip: Create a Property record first before looking it up here.
CustomField.label: Property
